# Individet Copilot Instructions

- `individet.github.io/content` is hands off.
- Never edit, rewrite, reformat, rename, move, or delete files under `content/`.
- Treat `content/` as human-maintained editorial source material.
- This repository powers `www.individet.no`.
- If site behavior needs to change, update Astro code, schemas, routes, or docs outside `content/`.
